attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT RANK() OVER( ORDER BY      
PRODUCT_KEY,
BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY	,
TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID,
DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
DV_CHARGES_FLG,
DV_MISC_FLG,
DV_SERVICE_FLG,
DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
DV_REVENUE_FLG,
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME  ,/*Added as part of ICPM P&L hierarchy*/
BK_DEAL_ID /*Added as part of ICPM FCM*/
)+SIRCAAKEY.MAX_VAL GL_SVC_REV_ALCTN_KEY,
WIKEYS.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG BK_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WIKEYS.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(WIKEYS.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,'UNKNOWN' ) BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGRY_CD,
WIKEYS.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG BK_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_REVENUE_FLG BK_REVENUE_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_CHARGES_FLG BK_CHARGES_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_MISC_FLG BK_MISC_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_SERVICE_FLG BK_SERVICE_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG BK_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG BK_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
WIKEYS.TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WIKEYS.PRODUCT_KEY BK_PRODUCT_KEY,
WIKEYS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
WIKEYS.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
WIKEYS.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,      
WIKEYS.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
WIKEYS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMER_INT,  
WIKEYS.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID  TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT,  
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
WIKEYS.BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
WIKEYS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
WIKEYS.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME, /*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID , /*Added as part of ICPM FCM*/
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
USER EDW_CREATE_USER   
FROM (
SELECT 
COALESCE(MAX(TRNGTD_GL_SVC_REV_ALCTN_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_TRNGLTED_GL_SVC_REV_ALLOCTN   SIRCAA
) SIRCAAKEY,
$$STGDB.WI_AE_GL_TRIANG_ALLOCATION   WIKEYS
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(
SELECT 1
FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_TRNGLTED_GL_SVC_REV_ALLOCTN SAGSTA
WHERE 
WIKEYS.PRODUCT_KEY =SAGSTA.BK_PRODUCT_KEY
AND WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 		=SAGSTA.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY	
AND WIKEYS.TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 	=SAGSTA.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND WIKEYS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =SAGSTA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMER_INT
AND WIKEYS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD 			=SAGSTA.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD 		=SAGSTA.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD 		=SAGSTA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
AND WIKEYS.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD	=SAGSTA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD	=SAGSTA.BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD =SAGSTA.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGRY_CD
AND WIKEYS.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG=SAGSTA.BK_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_IC_REVENUE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_CHARGES_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_CHARGES_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_MISC_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_MISC_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_SERVICE_FLG=SAGSTA.BK_SERVICE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_REVENUE_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_REVENUE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID =SAGSTA.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
AND WIKEYS.BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD =SAGSTA.BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD
AND WIKEYS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =SAGSTA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND WIKEYS.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME=SAGSTA.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME /*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
AND WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID=SAGSTA.BK_DEAL_ID /*Added as part of ICPM FCM*/
)

SELECT 
NP.ITEM_KEY PRODUCT_KEY, 
EST_ORIGINAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
EST_TRNGLTD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
WAGSTA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
WAGSTA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
WAGSTA.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, 
WAGSTA.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_CHARGES_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_MISC_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_SERVICE_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_REVENUE_FLG, 
COALESCE(WAGSTA.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID , -999) TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID,
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM)  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, 
SUM(WAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT)  AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
'SPA' AS DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
-9999 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(WAGSTA.PL_LINE_ITEM,'UNKNOWN') PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME, /*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
COALESCE( WAGSTA.DEAL_ID, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_AE_GL_TRIANG_ALLOCATION  WAGSTA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON( WAGSTA.PRODUCT_ID =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_ORIGINAL
ON( EST_ORIGINAL.TERRITORY_CODE =WAGSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE     
AND EST_ORIGINAL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_TRNGLTD
ON( EST_TRNGLTD.TERRITORY_CODE =WAGSTA.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND EST_TRNGLTD.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
GROUP BY NP.ITEM_KEY,
EST_ORIGINAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
EST_TRNGLTD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WAGSTA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
WAGSTA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
WAGSTA.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, 
WAGSTA.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, 
WAGSTA.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_CHARGES_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_MISC_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_SERVICE_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
WAGSTA.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
WAGSTA.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID,
DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WAGSTA.PL_LINE_ITEM,
WAGSTA.DEAL_ID

SELECT 
EXAGSTA.PRODUCT_ID,
EXAGSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
EXAGSTA.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
EXAGSTA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
EXAGSTA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
EXAGSTA.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
EXAGSTA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
EXAGSTA.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
EXAGSTA.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
EXAGSTA.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
EXAGSTA.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_MISC_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
EXAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
SUB_MEASURE_KEY,
EXAGSTA.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID,
EXAGSTA.CREATE_USER,
EXAGSTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
EXAGSTA.UPDATE_USER,
EXAGSTA.UPDATE_DATETIME,
EXAGSTA.CREATE_TIMESTAMP,              
EXAGSTA.ACTION_CODE,         
EXAGSTA.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
EXAGSTA.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME ,/*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
EXAGSTA.DEAL_ID
 FROM
(SELECT
SAGSTA.PRODUCT_ID,
SAGSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SAGSTA.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SAGSTA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
SAGSTA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
SAGSTA.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
SAGSTA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
SAGSTA.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
SAGSTA.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
SAGSTA.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
SAGSTA.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_MISC_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
SAGSTA.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
SUB_MEASURE_KEY,
SAGSTA.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID,
SAGSTA.CREATE_USER,
SAGSTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
SAGSTA.UPDATE_USER,
SAGSTA.UPDATE_DATETIME,
SAGSTA.CREATE_TIMESTAMP,              
SAGSTA.ACTION_CODE,         
'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE,
NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID || EST_ORIGINAL.TERRITORY_CODE || EST_TRIANGULATED.TERRITORY_CODE AS EXREC,
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
SAGSTA.PL_LINE_ITEM PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME, /*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
SAGSTA.DEAL_ID 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_GL_TRIANG_ALLOCATION SAGSTA
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP  ON SAGSTA.PRODUCT_ID =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_ORIGINAL ON EST_ORIGINAL.TERRITORY_CODE =SAGSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
                AND       EST_ORIGINAL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_TRIANGULATED ON  EST_TRIANGULATED.TERRITORY_CODE =SAGSTA.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
                AND       EST_TRIANGULATED.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'
)   EXAGSTA
WHERE     EXAGSTA.EXREC IS NULL

SELECT
SAGSTA.TRNGTD_GL_SVC_REV_ALCTN_KEY TRNGTD_GL_SVC_REV_ALCTN_KEY,
WIKEYS.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG BK_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WIKEYS.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(WIKEYS.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGRY_CD,
WIKEYS.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG BK_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_REVENUE_FLG BK_REVENUE_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_CHARGES_FLG BK_CHARGES_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_MISC_FLG BK_MISC_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_SERVICE_FLG BK_SERVICE_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG BK_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
WIKEYS.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG BK_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
WIKEYS.TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
SAGSTA.BK_PRODUCT_KEY  BK_PRODUCT_KEY,
WIKEYS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
WIKEYS.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
WIKEYS.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
WIKEYS.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT COMP_US_STNDRD_PRICE_AMT,
WIKEYS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
WIKEYS.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
WIKEYS.BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD,
WIKEYS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
WIKEYS.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,/*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE                  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_AE_GL_TRIANG_ALLOCATION   WIKEYS
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_TRNGLTED_GL_SVC_REV_ALLOCTN SAGSTA
on(WIKEYS.PRODUCT_KEY =SAGSTA.BK_PRODUCT_KEY
AND WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =SAGSTA.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND WIKEYS.TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =SAGSTA.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND WIKEYS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =SAGSTA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMER_INT
AND WIKEYS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD =SAGSTA.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD =SAGSTA.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD =SAGSTA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
AND WIKEYS.DD_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD =SAGSTA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =SAGSTA.BK_REV_MEASURE_TRNSCTN_TYPE_CD
AND WIKEYS.TRANSACATION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD =SAGSTA.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGRY_CD
AND WIKEYS.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG=SAGSTA.BK_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_IC_REVENUE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_CHARGES_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_CHARGES_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_MISC_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_MISC_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_SERVICE_FLG=SAGSTA.BK_SERVICE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
AND WIKEYS.DV_REVENUE_FLG =SAGSTA.BK_REVENUE_FLG
AND WIKEYS.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID =SAGSTA.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT
/* Including 2 new columns as part of QWN EDWTD-QWN-13607-5(snukala-Revenue) */
AND WIKEYS.BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD=SAGSTA.BK_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ALLOC_SRC_CD
AND WIKEYS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   =SAGSTA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND WIKEYS.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME = SAGSTA.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME /*Added as part of ICPM P&L Hierarchy*/
AND WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID = SAGSTA.BK_DEAL_ID /*Added as part of ICPM FCM*/
)
